entries.text: Hi there,
Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Oh, sorry, this is actually Sarah Chen.
Thanks for letting me know Sarah
I'm calling for myself.
Are you calling for yourself or for someone else today?
Please provide your date of birth.
Sure, it's March 15, 1988.
Just to confirm.
I have your name as Sarah Chen and your date of birth as March 15th, 1988. Is that correct? If so...
Could you please spell your first and last name for me?
Sure, it's S-A-R-A-H, and the last name is C-H-E-N.
Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please provide the number you have on file with us. If you're not sure, just let me know.
I'm not sure which number's on file. Could you look it up by my name and date of birth?
No problem.
To make sure I have it right, could you please confirm your first and last name and your date of birth one more time? Please spell them off for me.
Of course. It's Sarah Chen, S-A-R-A-H, C-H-E-N. And my birthdate is March 15, 1988.
Could you please spell your last name and confirm your date of birth as well?
Of course. My last name is spelled C-H-E-N, and my date of birth is March 15, 1988.
Sure, it’s March 15, 1988.
Thank you. Could you also confirm your date of birth for me?
I have your phone number as 217-301-3971.
and your date of birth as March 15th.
Yes, that’s correct.
Is that correct?
I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
Would you like me to connect you to our patient support team?
Actually, I just need to cancel my appointment next Tuesday at 10 a.m. I’m not ready to reschedule yet.
I can't cancel your appointment right now due to a system issue, but I'll let our clinic support team know you want to cancel your appointment next Tuesday at 10 a.m.
They'll follow up with you as soon as possible. Please hold while I document your request.
Okay, I'll hold.
Alright, I’ll hold.
Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Goodbye.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
